creator: mazhe@alkumuna.eu
text:
Created attachment 149908
Update to mDNSResponder-561.1.1

Hi, I am the maintainer of dns/mDNSResponder_nss, and following net/mDNSResponder update to 561.1.1, I'd like to made the following patch committed to my port.

The changelog is :
 * Update to 561.1.1
 * Fix building on arm* platforms
 * Add a pkg-message

Redports being down, I just have the check-plist report to go with it:
freedom:/usr/ports/dns/mDNSResponder_nss# make check-plist
====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
===> No pkg-plist issues found (check-plist)

But being tiny as it is, there is not much to review in this port/patch :)
